flags.concern: Timeline canvas integration testing: Step 8 only mentions updating `useTimelineTrackManagement.test.ts`, but the real risk in this refactor is the new in-canvas row rendering and the `startLeft`-driven drag/drop wiring, and the repository currently has no automated coverage for those paths.
flags.evidence: The plan's only explicit test target is `src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useTimelineTrackManagement.test.ts`, while the changed behavior will live in `src/tools/video-editor/components/TimelineEditor/TimelineCanvas.tsx`, `src/tools/video-editor/components/TimelineEditor/TrackLabel.tsx`, `src/tools/video-editor/lib/drop-position.ts`, `src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useDragCoordinator.ts`, and `src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useExternalDrop.ts`. A repository search found no existing tests for those files.
